headline: Textron Aviation Moves Ascend Jets To NetJets And Expands Asia Pacific Support
summary: Textron Aviation has delivered the first Cessna Citation Ascend midsize business jets to NetJets, marking the entry of the new model into fleet service. The company has also opened an expanded service facility in Melbourne, adding capacity for customers in Australia and the broader Asia Pacific region. These developments highlight fresh activity around Textron Aviation's product rollout and support network that has not been covered previously. For investors tracking Textron (NYSE:TXT), the...
